codeReview.summary: The fix commit correctly makes `TeleprompterView.onExit` continue through `exitTeleprompter()` and local store cleanup when `unregisterHotkeys()` rejects, and it adds a focused regression test for that button path. But the overlay still has a second exit path through `hotkey://stop` in `App.tsx`, and that handler retains the original single-`try` failure mode, so an `unregisterHotkeys()` rejection can still abort exit and leave local teleprompter state stuck.

issues.description: The overlay `hotkey://stop` handler still awaits `ipc.unregisterHotkeys()`, `ipc.exitTeleprompter()`, and the local `playing/editMode/mode` reset inside one `try`. If `unregisterHotkeys()` rejects there, the catch runs before `exitTeleprompter()` or the state cleanup, reproducing the same stuck-exit failure that this fix removed from `TeleprompterView`. The reviewed diffs leave that exit path unchanged, so exit flow resilience is still incomplete.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `frontend-redesign` skill procedure still does not match how small fix sessions are actually executed or reported.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\skills\frontend-redesign\SKILL.md:21 requires invoking `frontend-design` at session start, line 31 requires reading `.factory/library/architecture.md`, and lines 41-45 require a RED test-first phase. But C:\Users\mitte\.factory\missions\fe650437-0d94-4ece-8085-ac6da736d0ec\worker-transcripts.jsonl:26 shows the fix session starting with `mission-worker-base`, reading mission files plus `.factory/library\README.md`, editing `TeleprompterView.tsx`, and only afterward noting 'Now let me invoke the skill' without any actual `frontend-redesign` tool call. The handoff at C:\Users\mitte\.factory\missions\fe650437-0d94-4ece-8085-ac6da736d0ec\handoffs\2026-04-10T16-30-47-484Z__fix-exit-resilience__1f56a7d1-aa34-47d2-9c7e-45e7e93c1f91.json:48-51 still records `"followedProcedure": true` while also saying the skill was not invoked.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Workers are still being pointed at `.factory/library/README.md`, but this repository still has no such shared-library index file.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: C:\Users\mitte\.factory\missions\fe650437-0d94-4ece-8085-ac6da736d0ec\worker-transcripts.jsonl:26 includes `Read D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\library\README.md`. However, `D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\library` currently contains only `architecture.md`, `environment.md`, and `user-testing.md`.

summary: Fail. Commit `95ef80b` fixes the original TeleprompterView exit-button bug and adds the expected regression test, but the overlay's `hotkey://stop` exit path in `src/App.tsx` still aborts on `unregisterHotkeys()` rejection, so exit flow resilience remains incomplete.
